Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Goldsteel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Goldsteel is a primary mineral output from the mines of Mount Venture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Goldsteel reflects pure white light and provides protection against Remnants.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Some types of madra can only be manipulated by goldsteel tools.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Goldsteel is a unique substance that can get a firm grip on virtually any kind of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Goldsteel is an exotic metal used in Soulsmith tools.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Goldsteel is required to manipulate Remnant parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Madra cannot pass through goldsteel.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha has a hooked blade of gleaming goldsteel.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Goldsteel is resistant to various types of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon rested his fingers on the goldsteel.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
